headline: D94b two-model rerun is in progress
message: A low-concurrency long loop is currently trying to recover the two blocked models.
notes: Config: llama timeout 600s / workers 1 / rpm 12 / round-robin keys 1..7
Config: nemotron timeout 300s / max_tokens 2048 / workers 1 / rpm 12 / round-robin keys 1..7
